_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 expression profiling in IDH-wildtype glioblastoma: genomic associations and survival outcomes.

_contextSnippet: The iNF-07E antibody was appropriately negative in the tissue specimen from a patient with NF-1 (Fig. 3 C), but immunoreactive in a specimen with no NF1 alterations
details: Negative staining in tissue specimen from patient with NF-1, positive in specimen with no NF1 alterations
